title: McCarthy Tétrault recognized by World Trademark Review in its 2024 WTR 1000 rankings
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault recognized by World Trademark Review in its 2024 WTR 1000 rankings
February 21, 2024 – McCarthy Tétrault’s trademark expertise has been recognized in the 2024 World Trademark Review 1000: Leading Trademark Professionals , reflecting our innovative work helping clients acquire or enforce their trademarks across borders.
The firm was recognized and ranked with silver and in addition, four of our lawyers have been ranked in three different categories:
- Amy Fong (Bronze - Individuals: enforcement and litigation)
- Daniel Glover ( Bronze - Individuals: enforcement and litigation)
- David Tait ( Bronze - Individuals: enforcement and litigation)
- Vincent Yip ( Bronze - Individuals: prosecution and strategy; Highly recommended - Individuals: transactions)
The results were derived from a comprehensive qualitative research study carried out by WTR to highlight firms and individuals excelling in this practice area. The leading firms were identified based on several factors, including their expertise, market visibility, and the complexity of work they typically handle. Positive feedback from peers and clients was also a significant consideration.
If you subscribe to WTR 1000, view the results here .
